title: Date difference returns month_interval instead of day_interval
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE date_test (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, start_date DATE, end_date DATE, interval_diff INTERVAL);
UPDATE date_test SET interval_diff = end_date - start_date WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, EXTRACT(DAY FROM (end_date - start_date)) AS day_diff FROM date_test;
SELECT id, (end_date - start_date) AS day_diff FROM date_test;
key_bug_features: Date difference calculation returns incorrect interval type
